name: Hand-mechanism spacer (disc)
notes: Disc spacer. Glue note on Panel D: 'Glue to cardboard 1mm thick' — represented as material=cardboard-1mm. Per §II.D: pieces 91, 92, and 92a stack along the minute-hand axle to separate piece 4 from the minute-hand wheel. The same axle (id 'minute-hand-axle') is shared with piece 91, which satisfies the linter's axle-cross-reference check inside plate D. Connection encoding: Panel D records labels 'a₄₁' and 'b₄₁' on this piece — interpreted literally as receiver zones for piece 41's a/b tabs. This is suspicious: piece 41 is a motor-wheel pulley strip (§II.B.1), with no obvious physical relationship to a hand-mechanism spacer. The labels may be a transcription artifact (cf. the 'inconsistent piece-number references' caveat at the end of instructions.md); flagged for re-verification during M1 task 1.5 or against the cleaned scan. If wrong, the more likely target is piece 4 (a₄ / b₄), since 92 sits directly against piece 4.
